heroHeadline: World Condemns 'Brutal' Israeli Lebanon Strikes as US-Iran Ceasefire Holds
heroSubtitle: Global condemnation erupts over continued Israeli attacks on Lebanon even as the US-brokered Iran ceasefire holds — Netanyahu has confirmed the ceasefire does not cover Lebanon. Hegseth declared US victory in the Iran war while Iranians expressed public relief.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-08. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Anadolu Agency, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post, Financial Times, AgoraVox, The Guardian, BBC, New York Times, Fox News, Military.com.
